title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Adidas India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adidas India Ventures Solutions:
Adidas India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India Ventures Solutions!
